AFTER.description: Cavity-free children per 100 in each of the 16 North American cities AFTER public water fluoridation; used together with BEFORE to compute the paired differences for the 95% confidence interval of the mean change.

BEFORE.description: Cavity-free children per 100 in each of the 16 North American cities BEFORE public water fluoridation; used together with AFTER to compute the paired differences for the 95% confidence interval of the mean change.
